2606.20135.title: Frequency-Aware Flow Matching for Continuous and Consistent Robotic Action Generation
2606.20135.paper_summary: Flow matching has emerged as a standard paradigm for robotic manipulation owing to its strong expressive power for modelling complex, multimodal action distributions, alongside similar approaches like diffusion policy. However, existing methods rely on discretized action chunks, making them brittle to demonstrations collected at heterogeneous control frequencies and prone to temporally inconsistent actions that degrade control stability. In this paper, we propose Frequency-Aware Flow Matching (FAFM), which outputs continuous, temporally consistent actions. To handle heterogeneous frequency input, we transform discrete action sequences into the frequency domain with the discrete cosine transform (DCT), perform flow matching over the resulting coefficients, and reconstruct continuous actions via cosine basis expansion. To generate temporally consistent actions, we regularize the first-order temporal derivative to promote smooth actions. This corresponds to a Sobolev-type constraint that suppresses high-frequency errors and discourages abrupt action changes. Our FAFM is simple, introduces no additional network parameters and applies to standalone flow-matching policies and vision-language action models. Across synthetic toy benchmark, obstacle avoidance, LapGym, and LIBERO, FAFM improves success rates, multimodal expressivity, motion smoothness, convergence speed, robustness to mechanical bias and mixed-frequency input. These gains are consistent when deployed on a real-world Franka robot. Code available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FAFM.
2606.20135.paper_summary_zh: 流匹配已成為機器人操作的一個標準範式，因為它在建模複雜的多模態動作分佈方面具有強大的表達能力，與擴散策略等類似方法並駕齊驅。<lb/>然而，現有方法依賴於離散化的動作片段，使其對於在異質控制頻率下收集的演示變得脆弱，並且容易產生時間上不一致的動作，從而降低控制穩定性。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了頻率感知流匹配（FAFM），它輸出連續且時間一致的動作。<lb/>為了處理異質頻率輸入，我們使用離散餘弦變換（DCT）將離散動作序列轉換到頻率域，對結果係數進行流匹配，並通過餘弦基擴展重建連續動作。<lb/>為了生成時間一致的動作，我們對一階時間導數進行正則化，以促進平滑的動作。<lb/>這相當於一種Sobolev類約束，抑制高頻誤差並不鼓勵突變的動作變化。<lb/>我們的FAFM簡單，不引入額外的網絡參數，並適用於獨立的流匹配策略和視覺-語言動作模型。<lb/>在合成玩具基準、避障、LapGym和LIBERO等場景中，FAFM提高了成功率、多模態表達能力、運動平滑性、收斂速度、對機械偏差和混合頻率輸入的魯棒性。<lb/>這些增益在部署於真實世界的Franka機器人時也是一致的。<lb/>代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FAFM 獲得。
2606.20135.author: Jianing Guo et.al.
2606.20135.authors: Jianing Guo, Fangzheng Chen, Zihao Mao, Wong Lik Hang Kenny, Zhenhong Wu, Yu Li, Yishuai Cai, Yuanpei Chen, Yikun Ban, Kai Chen, Qi Dou, Yaodong Yang, Xianglong Liu, Huijie Zhao, Simin Li
